false_greens.summary: Production validation had no real proof producer and trusted worker-controlled .gsd/shepherd-validation.json.
Production invoked unsupported gsd headless shepherd-validate; helper tests replaced the command and did not prove production callability.

Use the installed documented Pi CLI rather than modifying pinned official GSD or inventing a GSD unit.
Sequential mutating work; no overlapping workers.
